title: Big Tech blow-out, Powell's recession warning, lab-grown meat, RFK Jr shakes up race & more
description:
(0:00) Bestie intro!

(1:10) Google's mixed bag, Big tech leaves the growth phase, macro picture

(24:21) AI update: new projects, global enablement, early adoption

(37:38) SF CRE continues to collapse, Gotham City update

(47:52) Lab-grown meat: possibilities, potential impact, and major constraints

(1:06:47) Quick earnings button and RFK Jr's presidential bid

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses Big Tech's mixed earnings, the macroeconomic picture, AI updates, and lab-grown meat. They also touch on SF's commercial real estate collapse and RFK Jr's presidential bid. The hosts analyze the current state of the tech industry and its potential impact on the economy.

takeaways.text: Big Tech is leaving the growth phase
SF commercial real estate is collapsing
RFK Jr's presidential bid shakes up the race

sentiment.notes: The hosts are cautious about the current state of the tech industry and its potential impact on the economy. They discuss the challenges faced by Big Tech and the potential risks of AI adoption.

notable_moments.description: Discussion of Big Tech's mixed earnings
